mapper.sql: rri.job_name, rri.dept_name, rri.expected_salary, rri.gender, rri.id_number, rri.birthday, rri.height, rri.weight, rri.nation, rri.marital_status, rri.political, rri.mobile_phone, rri.email, rri.household_character, rri.address, rri.zipcode, rri.household_address, rri.household_zipcode, rri.collective_household_flag, rri.collective_address, rri.native_place, rri.terminate_contract_flag, rri.occupational_diseases_flag, rri.termination_agreement_flag, rri.health_flag, rri.entry_time, rri.recruitment_flag, rri.remarks, rri.name, rri.relationship, rri.company, rri.post, rri.tele, rri.attribute1, rri.attribute2, rri.attribute3, rri.attribute4, rri.attribute5, rri.enabled_flag, rri.in_factory_flag, rri.id, rri.create_by, rri.update_time, rri.create_time, rri.update_by

${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.expected_salary as ${tAlias}_expected_salary, ${tAlias}.gender as ${tAlias}_gender, ${tAlias}.id_number as ${tAlias}_id_number, ${tAlias}.birthday as ${tAlias}_birthday, ${tAlias}.height as ${tAlias}_height, ${tAlias}.weight as ${tAlias}_weight, ${tAlias}.nation as ${tAlias}_nation, ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.in_factory_flag as ${tAlias}_in_factory_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_recruitment_interface (job_name, dept_name, expected_salary, gender, id_number, birthday, height, weight, nation, marital_status, political, mobile_phone, email, household_character, address, zipcode, household_address, household_zipcode, collective_household_flag, collective_address, native_place, terminate_contract_flag, occupational_diseases_flag, termination_agreement_flag, health_flag, entry_time, recruitment_flag, remarks, name, relationship, company, post, tele, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, enabled_flag, in_factory_flag, create_by, update_time, create_time, update_by) values (#{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expectedSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{collectiveHouseholdFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{collectiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{terminateContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{occupationalDiseasesFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{terminationAgreementFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{healthFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{recruitmentFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{inFactoryFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_recruitment_interface set job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expected_salary = #{expectedSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, id_number = #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, height = #{height,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, nation = #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, marital_status = #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, political = #{political,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile_phone = #{mobilePhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_character = #{householdCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zipcode = #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_address = #{householdAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_zipcode = #{householdZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, collective_household_flag = #{collectiveHouseholdFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, collective_address = #{collectiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, native_place = #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, terminate_contract_flag = #{terminateContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, occupational_diseases_flag = #{occupationalDiseasesFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, termination_agreement_flag = #{terminationAgreementFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, health_flag = #{healthFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, entry_time = #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, recruitment_flag = #{recruitmentFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, relationship = #{relationship,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, in_factory_flag = #{inFactoryFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
